core_thesis: Friedrich Nietzsche is included here as a comparator for a philosophy that treats truth, morality, and selfhood as interpretive formations rather than access to a fixed metaphysical subject. In Beyond Good and Evil he calls the physicist's law-governed nature an interpretation, not a text, and offers will to power as another interpretation of the same world ([Beyond Good and Evil §22](cite://nietzsche/en-beyond-good-and-evil/22)). In the Genealogy, he rejects a neutral doer behind action and reads moral responsibility as a linguistic and social construction that lets weakness appear as merit ([Genealogy I.13](cite://nietzsche/en-genealogy-of-morals/1.13)). Twilight of the Idols attacks the grammar of substance, ego, and "true world" metaphysics while defending becoming and sensory evidence ([Twilight, "Reason in Philosophy" §§2-6](cite://nietzsche/en-twilight-idols/reason-in-philosophy.2-6)). His affirmative test is eternal recurrence: whether one can will this life again, posed in The Joyful Wisdom and dramatized in Zarathustra's convalescence ([Joyful Wisdom §341](cite://nietzsche/en-joyful-wisdom/341); [Zarathustra LVII](cite://nietzsche/en-thus-spake-zarathustra/LVII)).

cross_engagements.brief: Abhinavagupta presses the same selfhood structure axis in the phenomenological register, but with the value `relational-self` rather than `no-enduring-self`.
Adi Sankara presses the same finite cognition axis in the epistemological register, but with the value `adhyasa-or-superimposition` rather than `perspectival-interpretation`.
Akalanka presses the same epistemic authority axis in the epistemological register, but with the value `plural-pramana-realism` rather than `genealogical-critique`.
Judith Butler works the same method axis in the historical-genealogical register. Here the operative value is `genealogy`; Judith Butler lands on that same value.
Baladeva Vidyabhushana presses the same perspectivism axis in the epistemological register, but with the value `partial-perspectives-ranked` rather than `perspectives-as-symptoms`.
Akshapada Gautama presses the same soteric end axis in the soteriological register, but with the value `isolation-or-discriminative-release` rather than `not-soteriological`.
